title: Fermented Flaky Venezuelan Soffritto-base Salad
description: A weeknight-friendly, anti-inflammatory salad featuring fermented soffritto-base, flaky textures, and crunchy iceberg lettuce.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, blend the fermented soffritto-base until it reaches a flaky texture.
In a large bowl, combine the blended soffritto-base, chopped cilantro, chopped red onion, diced tomatoes, and shredded iceberg lettuce.
In a small bowl, whisk together the avocado oil and lime juice.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if necessary.
